        "A": "10, ['Property listings for modern condos/apartments in Toronto with price, size, bedrooms, ratings, and features (maps to property_listings)', 'Property features including energy-efficient design, smart_home, eco-friendly, open_concept, modern_development (maps to special_features)', 'Location details such as business district, city center, proximity to transit and amenities (maps to location_neighborhood and proximity_* fields)', 'Availability of virtual tours and photos (maps to virtual_tour_available and viewing_available)', 'Requests to arrange in-person or virtual viewings (maps to viewing_coordination)', 'Discussion of financing options including mortgage, first-time buyer schemes, down payment, LTV, interest rate, term, and fees (maps to financing_options)', 'Requests for preferred viewing or moving dates (maps to timeline_coordination and viewing_coordination)', 'Estimates for legal services, surveys, moving, and utility setup costs (maps to service_packages and total_package_summary)', 'Status/availability of properties (maps to status_updates.property_status)', 'Requests for confirmation to proceed with financing or booking (maps to contact_coordination.next_action_required and confirmation_tracking)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
